Name Email Mobile Your Place Type  Your Query Welcome to Shree Jeewan Hospital Shree Jeewan Hospital is a Multispecialty  Hospital,  established in 1920, providing comprehensive medical care. We have well furnished three modern Operation Theatres & 24 hours clinical lab, X-ray, E.C.G. and ultrasound facility with 24 hours Emergency. Our treatment facilities with technologically advanced equipment and systems are all backed by the expertise and reputation of the Hospital's consultants, resident doctors, nurses and paramedics. Our Doctors & Departments EYE Dr. Vijay Sabharwal - MD, DO Dr. Ankita Sabharwal - MS OPTICAL & CONTACT LENS Dr. Rakesh Kalra - B.Oph GYNAE & OBSTETRICS Dr. Suman Sabharwal - DGO Dr. Ramnik sabharwal - MS PAEDIATRICS Dr. Renu trehan - MD Dr. Jyoti Anand MEDICINE Dr. S.K Aggarwal - MD SURGERY Dr. Anand Tyagi - MS UROLOGY Dr. Ashish Sabharwal - MS, DNB ORTHOPEADICS PHYSIOTHERPY Dr. Arvind Kumar - BPT, MIAP DENTAL Dr. Mohit Handa - BDS E.N.T Dr. A.K Anand PSYCHIATRY Dr. Mukesh Batra - MD Our Empanelments Patient's Testimonials I have  been very pleased with my Lasik Surgery.  Great comments have been made on  the Glasses Removal,  counting on great ones on the Laisk Procedure.  Thank you so much!" 22 year Old, Male, Deepak I've had excellent care from Dr. Jacobs & all the nurses during my stay.
